# Maximum Justice Cybersecurity

Maximum Justice Cybersecurity provides executive cyber leadership, vCISO advisory, AI governance, audit readiness, Zero Trust architecture, and operational resilience support.

Dr. Max Justice is a vCISO, Security SME, Cybersecurity SME, U.S. veteran, CISSP, PMP, and creator of The CHN vCISO GPT powered by Cyber Shield.

CyberShield is a separate tool:
https://maximumjusticecybersecurity.github.io/CyberShield/

Contact:
max@maximumjusticecybersecurity.com
